sections.heading: Painting Sonoma County with kindness and integrity
body: Royal Kingdom Painting (RKP) is a Sonoma County based painting and decorating company that takes pride in its workmanship. Owned and operated by Kyle Isom, the company treats every client with kindness and integrity and approaches each project as if it were their own home or business.

As a locally owned company, RKP knows the styles and conditions of Sonoma County homes and commercial spaces. The crew is licensed, bonded and insured, and committed to a seamless experience from the first call through the final walkthrough, leaving each space looking its best.
highlights: Owned and operated by Kyle Isom, serving Sonoma County
Residential and commercial painting and decorating

items.title: Interior Painting
items.description: Walls, ceilings, trim and detail work that refreshes the inside of your home with clean lines and a lasting finish.

items.title: Exterior Painting
items.description: Durable exterior coatings that protect and renew your home against Sonoma County's sun, fog and seasonal weather.

items.title: Cabinet Painting & Refinishing
items.description: Cabinet refinishing that gives kitchens and baths a fresh, factory-smooth look without the cost of replacement.

items.title: Decks & Fences
items.description: Staining and painting for decks and fences to restore color, seal the wood and extend its life outdoors.

items.title: Commercial Painting
items.description: Painting for offices, property management, education centers and medical facilities, scheduled around your operations.

items.quote: Royal Kingdom Painting has painted my house inside and out. Kyle the owner is a great guy, he is easy to deal with, accurate with his painting, so we have had him come back a couple of times to do separate projects, and he is always willing to complete jobs on time
items.author: Verified review · Sonoma
